programme.title: Global Security Swarm Report
programme.desc: Continuous Monitoring feeds and compliance updates live from the HOCH Swarm.

programme.title: Swarm Execution Speedruns
programme.desc: Live coverage of autonomous agent pipelines competing for minimum token counts.

programme.title: Tears of Steel (Agent Cut)
programme.desc: Sci-Fi feature tracking autonomous drones securing high-trust compliance boundaries.
